title: Leaves and Twiggs
description:
Datapack that adds leaf and sapling recipes for early game convince and mid-late game surplus sapling management.

Dev on all my projects will be paused for the duration of the BDS boycott against Microsoft.
body:
Do you have too many saplings? I do: That's why I made this data pack.

Craft saplings into leaf blocks or sticks, or smelt them into dead bushes.

Plus, craft sticks from dead bushes and craft saplings from leaves and sticks
